## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rimkus and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress, feedback, and AI visibility tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [5 blog posts to be published by Friday; next 5 aimed for Wednesday publication](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Content audit in progress: 50 articles reviewed, flagging duplicates and thin content](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Scrunch AI visibility dashboard set up; need to separate BES and forensics metrics](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Writing guidelines to be updated based on recent feedback and comments](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Feedback and Publishing Process

  - [Rimkus team reviewing 5 blog posts; feedback mostly positive with minor style adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement edits within 24-48 hours](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Publishing process: GrowthX to draft in prod environment, Alishia to review and publish](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Goal: Publish 5 posts by Friday, aim for next 5 by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Writing Guidelines and Style Updates

  - [Avoid direct "you" references; use specific job roles or responsibilities instead](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Consistency in using cedilla in "façade" across all content types](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Add modifiers like "typically" for broad statements about services](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile updated writing guidelines from feedback and share with Rimkus](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Content Audit Progress

  - [50 articles reviewed so far](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Flagging issues: duplicate content, thin content, misplaced articles (e.g., employee spotlights)](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Rimkus to decide on handling historical web campaign content](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Discuss workflow for content refreshes: GrowthX to handle major rewrites, Rimkus for minor updates](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Content Tracking System

  - [Suggestion: Excel spreadsheet with columns for title, URL, category, publish date, last update date](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Jennifer to handle manually for now, consider automation in future](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Scrunch AI Visibility Dashboard

  - [Dashboard set up to track Rimkus visibility across various AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Current view combines BES and forensics; need to separate metrics](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [GrowthX to send prompt list for Rimkus to tag and categorize](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Consider updating competitor list for more relevant comparisons in BES-only view](https://fathom.video/share/dVoPsqZYpe5AGExPw1G_-zKZCsFxdvUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

## Next Steps
